media-errors.not-found: We couldn't find a camera on your device. Please use another device.
media-errors.already-in-use: Another application is using your camera, please close the other application and try again.
media-errors.constraint: We couldn't find a camera that could be used to take photos. Please use another device.
media-errors.other-error: There was an error accessing your camera. Please try again.

missing-permissions.title: Allow access to your camera
missing-permissions.subtitle: We will need you to take photos of your document to properly verify your identity.
missing-permissions.cta: Open settings to give camera permissions

id-doc-photo-prompt.title: Scan or upload the {{side}} of your {{type}} ({{country}})

check-lighting.title: Check your lighting
check-lighting.description: It can't be too bright or too dark.

selfie-consent.title: We need a selfie to verify your identity
selfie-consent.subtitle: By continuing, you're agreeing to Footprint collecting and processing your biometric data from your selfie and identity document.
selfie-consent.third-party-consent: Optional: Allow Footprint's third-party providers to improve their products with this data. Privacy Policy.
selfie-consent.third-party-consent-text: Allow Footprint's third-party providers to improve their products with this data.

next-side.one-side: Now the photo page of your passport

instructions.position: Position your face within the frame
instructions.readiness: Take the photo when you're ready

country-and-type-selection.title: Scan or upload your ID
country-and-type-selection.subtitle: We need some more information about your identity.

form.not-supported: Sorry, we don't support IDs for your country yet.

selfie-photo-prompt.title: Take a selfie
selfie-photo-prompt.subtitle: This will allow us to validate the ID document you uploaded in the previous step.

check-lighting.title: Check your lighting
check-lighting.description: It can't be too bright or too dark.

whole-face.title: Position your face within the frame

retry-limit-exceeded.title: Too many attempts
retry-limit-exceeded.description: Sorry, we can't continue onboarding as you've tried to submit your document images too many times. We'll reach out if we need more info.

device-warning.warning: This action can only be performed on a mobile phone. Please go back to the previous screen/tab and click the "Cancel" button to generate a new QR code with a new URL link. Open the new link on your phone.
